_comment: Financial E2E baseline for wind_battery_hospital example. Generated by tests/python/integration/test_e2e_financial.py on first run.
_description: Expected ranges for equity IRR and NPV computed from the wind_battery_hospital example REopt result with 70% debt at 8.5% over 10 years, 20-year analysis, 5% escalation.
note: Update ranges by deleting this file and re-running the E2E test; it will regenerate.
